mapper.select:
SELECT id, reason, type, cnt, title, excerpt, cat, cat_key, author, time, status, action FROM ( SELECT pr.post_id AS id, (SELECT reason FROM post_report WHERE post_id = pr.post_id AND status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS reason, '게시글' AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(cp.title, '(제목 없음)') AS title, LEFT(COALESCE(cp.content, ''), 200) AS excerpt, CASE cp.category WHEN 'FREE' THEN '자유게시판' WHEN 'JOB' THEN '취업정보' WHEN 'INTERVIEW' THEN '면접후기' WHEN 'PORTFOLIO' THEN '포트폴리오' ELSE cp.category END AS cat, LOWER(COALESCE(cp.category, 'free')) AS cat_key, CONCAT('익명_', pr.post_id) AS author, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(pr.created_at), NOW()) AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pr.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'pending' ELSE 'resolved' END AS status, MAX(CASE WHEN pr.action_taken IS NOT NULL AND pr.action_taken != 'NONE' THEN pr.action_taken ELSE NULL END) AS action FROM post_report pr LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = pr.post_id GROUP BY pr.post_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category
UNION ALL
SELECT cr.comment_id + 1000000 AS id, (SELECT reason FROM comment_report WHERE comment_id = cr.comment_id AND status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS reason, '댓글' AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, LEFT(COALESCE(cc.content, ''), 50) AS title, LEFT(COALESCE(cc.content, ''), 200) AS excerpt, '댓글' AS cat, 'free' AS cat_key, CONCAT('익명_', cr.comment_id) AS author, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(cr.created_at), NOW()) AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cr.status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'pending' ELSE 'resolved' END AS status, MAX(CASE WHEN cr.action_taken IS NOT NULL AND cr.action_taken != 'NONE' THEN cr.action_taken ELSE NULL END) AS action FROM comment_report cr LEFT JOIN community_comment cc ON cc.id = cr.comment_id GROUP BY cr.comment_id, cc.content ) merged
WHERE status = #{status}
ORDER BY cnt DESC, time ASC

select.if: SELECT pr.post_id AS id, (SELECT reason FROM post_report WHERE post_id = pr.post_id AND status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS reason, '게시글' AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, COALESCE(cp.title, '(제목 없음)') AS title, LEFT(COALESCE(cp.content, ''), 200) AS excerpt, CASE cp.category WHEN 'FREE' THEN '자유게시판' WHEN 'JOB' THEN '취업정보' WHEN 'INTERVIEW' THEN '면접후기' WHEN 'PORTFOLIO' THEN '포트폴리오' ELSE cp.category END AS cat, LOWER(COALESCE(cp.category, 'free')) AS cat_key, CONCAT('익명_', pr.post_id) AS author, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(pr.created_at), NOW()) AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN pr.status='PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'pending' ELSE 'resolved' END AS status, MAX(CASE WHEN pr.action_taken IS NOT NULL AND pr.action_taken != 'NONE' THEN pr.action_taken ELSE NULL END) AS action FROM post_report pr LEFT JOIN community_post cp ON cp.id = pr.post_id WHERE pr.post_id = #{id} GROUP BY pr.post_id, cp.title, cp.content, cp.category

SELECT cr.comment_id + 1000000 AS id, (SELECT reason FROM comment_report WHERE comment_id = cr.comment_id AND status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY reason ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1) AS reason, '댓글' AS type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, LEFT(COALESCE(cc.content,''), 50) AS title, LEFT(COALESCE(cc.content,''), 200) AS excerpt, '댓글' AS cat, 'free' AS cat_key, CONCAT('익명_', cr.comment_id) AS author, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, MIN(cr.created_at), NOW()) AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN cr.status='PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'pending' ELSE 'resolved' END AS status, MAX(CASE WHEN cr.action_taken IS NOT NULL AND cr.action_taken != 'NONE' THEN cr.action_taken ELSE NULL END) AS action FROM comment_report cr LEFT JOIN community_comment cc ON cc.id = cr.comment_id WHERE cr.comment_id = #{id} GROUP BY cr.comment_id, cc.content
SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM post_report WHERE post_id = #{targetId} GROUP BY reason ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT reason, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM comment_report WHERE comment_id = #{targetId} GROUP BY reason ORDER BY cnt DESC

mapper.update: UPDATE post_report SET status = #{status}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE comment_report SET status = #{status}, action_taken = #{actionTaken}, resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND status = 'PENDING'
